vision_raw.caption: a close up of a logo

dense_captions.text: a white letter on a grey background
a close up of a logo

llm_raw.summary: The image shows the ZONNIC logo on a grey-to-mint gradient background, but it lacks all required regulatory elements: the bilingual nicotine warning, the 18+ icon, and the risk communication text. The logo is present and visually correct, but the logo text is white instead of navy blue, which is not compliant for this background type. The C halo is navy blue, not the required gradient or secondary colour. Several critical violations require immediate fixes.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement (English or French) is visible at the top of the image.
No 18+ age restriction icon is visible anywhere in the image.
No risk communication text is visible at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible and unmodified.
Logo text is white on a light/gradient background; it should be navy blue for compliance.
The C halo is navy blue, not the required gradient or secondary colour for this background.
Logo is not distorted, stacked, or altered; no gradients or outlines in the text.
Background is a grey-to-mint gradient, matching approved flavour palette.
Gradient flows top-to-bottom with a visible split; logo is positioned at the top.
Background matches flavour-led content requirements (gradient from approved palette).
Only approved brand colours are used in the background and logo.
Logo uses correct font; no NRT lockup text is present, so lockup rules are not applicable.
Grey gradient rules apply to educational/brand content; this is flavour-led.
Logo has clear space around it; no elements intrude into the safety zone.
Halo does not blend into background; no flavour mismatch or logo in shapes detected.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top.
violations.evidence: No warning text visible in the top area.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ icon is present anywhere in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No risk text visible in the bottom area.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM.
violations.issue: Neither the nicotine warning nor the risk communication/18+ icon are present in the required positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top and risk communication/18+ icon at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French warning statements at the top.

violations.rule_text: On gradient backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must always be set in navy blue (#242c65).
violations.issue: Logo text is white instead of navy blue on a gradient background.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the logo text to navy blue (#242c65).

violations.rule_text: On white or grey gradient backgrounds, the word ZONNIC must be rendered in navy blue (#242c65).
violations.issue: Logo text is white instead of navy blue on a grey gradient background.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the logo text to navy blue (#242c65).

violations.rule_text: On gradient backgrounds, the C halo must be set in the secondary colour within the gradient, associated to the product's flavour profile.
violations.issue: C halo is navy blue, not the secondary colour from the gradient.
violations.fix_suggestion: Change the C halo to the secondary colour (mint) from the gradient.
violations.evidence: C halo is visibly navy blue.
